description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by a row of tall palm trees that provide a striking visual contrast. The structure is primarily rectangular, with large glass windows and open spaces that suggest an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor living. The front area includes a paved walkway lined with palm trees, leading to a recessed entryway. The rear of the house reveals a swimming pool, visible through expansive glass panels, and a spacious patio area. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or light gray, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is open and airy, with a strong connection to the landscaped outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, surrounded by palm trees and featuring a pool and open patio. The design emphasizes clean lines, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the house with a row of palm trees, a paved walkway, and the main entryway partially visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, showcasing the linear arrangement of palm trees and the elongated, windowed facade.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the house, revealing the swimming pool, patio area, and extensive glass windows.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the palm-lined walkway and the front facade, with the entryway and landscaping most prominent.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with paved walkway, flanked by palm trees, minimal overhang, and clean lines
